name: 22" Mixed Pine with Red Berries Artificial Christmas Wreath - Wondershop™: Indoor/Outdoor Use
description:
Spruce up your Christmas display with this 22-Inch Mixed Pine with Red Berries Artificial Christmas Wreath from Wondershop™. This circular Christmas wreath features a faux foliage of mixed pine branches that are decorated with bright red berries for a natural-themed festive look. The artificial wreath is suitable for door or wall placement in your indoor or sheltered outdoor space for versatile decorating possibilities.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
